steps.title: Use the privacy problem
steps.content: Players know games collect data, but advocates still want to expand players' knowledge of collection practices and privacy settings. That means the games are not clear enough about what they collect or why.

steps.title: Choose the transparency word
steps.content: Choice B means having mixed feelings, Choice C means harsh or irritating, and Choice D means candid or forthright. The context needs a word meaning unclear or not transparent about data practices. The answer is A.
